input.hiring_signal_brief: Recently posted 3 senior backend roles on LinkedIn; no engineering blog updates in 6 months.

candidate_output: Hi Jordan, I know you're looking for world-class backend engineers to scale your platform. We have top talent ready to jump in—let’s schedule a quick chat this week.
